opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These welts appeared out of nowhere, and the itching is completely maddening.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The rash came up really fast over a couple of hours and one antihistamine did nothing — I want to know it's not something dangerous.

symptom_narrative.character: raised itchy welts, pale in the middle with a red flare
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: started on my tummy, now across my torso and arms and legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: they come up in one spot then fade and appear somewhere else
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching and warmth seem to make it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the itch and welts — no swelling of my lips or trouble breathing
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't settle or sleep because of the itch

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mild cold about 4 days ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no new foods, medicines, or insect stings identified as a trigger

objective_data_offered.value: widespread raised itchy welts with pale centres, visible on video across torso and arms
breathing feels normal, no wheeze or throat tightness
